SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT THROUGH COURT CALL. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINNER, RANDALL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUNTING, MAUREEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
